note: Compound V3 Comet Unichain cUSDCv3 surface triage. Address provenance: Compound official deployments/unichain/usdc/roots.json and configuration.json. User-facing ABI provenance: Compound official CometInterface/CometMainInterface/CometExtInterface. Permission primitives allow/allowBySig/approve/approveThis are COVER by the manual red-flag rule.

0xf2b9fdb8.name: supply
0xf2b9fdb8.reason: user position: supply an asset to Comet; base asset supply can also repay debt according to Comet docs

0x4232cd63.name: supplyTo
0x4232cd63.reason: user position: supply an asset and credit a destination account

0x90323177.name: supplyFrom
0x90323177.reason: manager path: supply from an authorized source account to a destination account

0xa9059cbb.name: transfer
0xa9059cbb.reason: user fund move: transfer base-token balance inside Comet

0x23b872dd.name: transferFrom
0x23b872dd.reason: manager path: transfer base-token balance from an authorized source account

0x439e2e45.name: transferAsset
0x439e2e45.reason: user fund move: transfer collateral balance inside Comet

0xc1ee2c18.name: transferAssetFrom
0xc1ee2c18.reason: manager path: transfer collateral balance from an authorized source account

0xf3fef3a3.name: withdraw
0xf3fef3a3.reason: user position: withdraw collateral or base asset; withdrawing base may open/increase borrow depending on account state

0xc3b35a7e.name: withdrawTo
0xc3b35a7e.reason: user position: withdraw collateral/base asset to an explicit recipient

0x26441318.name: withdrawFrom
0x26441318.reason: manager path: withdraw collateral/base asset from an authorized source account

0xad14777c.name: approveThis
0xad14777c.reason: PERMISSION DELEGATION primitive: governor-only, but grants an external manager allowance over an asset held by Comet; approve-pattern red-flag

0xe478795d.name: withdrawReserves
0xe478795d.reason: governance (governor-only) reserve withdrawal, not a user wallet position action

0xc3cecfd2.name: absorb
0xc3cecfd2.reason: keeper/liquidator path: absorbs underwater accounts, not the protected user's own pre-sign position action

0xe4e6e779.name: buyCollateral
0xe4e6e779.reason: user fund move: buys discounted collateral from protocol reserves using base asset

0x44c35d07.name: pause
0x44c35d07.reason: governance/guardian pause controls, not a user fund or permission action

0xbfe69c8d.name: accrueAccount
0xbfe69c8d.reason: infra: permissionless interest/rewards accrual, moves no caller funds and grants no permission

0x1c9f7fb9.name: initializeStorage
0x1c9f7fb9.reason: infra/proxy initialization path; one-time setup, not a user wallet action

0x110496e5.name: allow
0x110496e5.reason: PERMISSION DELEGATION primitive: grants/revokes manager authority over all caller Comet positions

0xbb24d994.name: allowBySig
0xbb24d994.reason: PERMISSION DELEGATION primitive: on-chain submission of EIP-712 Authorization for manager authority

0x095ea7b3.name: approve
0x095ea7b3.reason: PERMISSION DELEGATION primitive: Comet's ERC20 approve is binary allow/revoke and grants spender manager authority over all owner assets

Authorization.reason: off-chain EIP-712 message a user signs for allowBySig; grants/revokes manager authority over all Comet positions
